title: Valentine's Period Temp ( Manual Work/Heavy Lifting )
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Xpressflower.com is one of Singapore's leading flowers & gifts service providers with over 15 years of experience delivering fresh flowers. We operate 18 outlets and provide 24-hour nationwide and international delivery, partnering with major brands to offer reliable and prompt service.

Job Summary

You will support delivery and warehouse operations during the Valentine’s period by assisting drivers with deliveries and helping manage warehouse tasks to ensure timely and accurate order fulfillment.

Responsibilities

  • Assist delivery drivers with loading and unloading vehicles to ensure safe and efficient handling of products
  • Support drivers in navigating delivery routes to meet scheduled delivery times
  • Deliver products to customers and clients, ensuring accurate and timely handover
  • Record delivery logs accurately to maintain up-to-date delivery records
  • Load and unload goods in the warehouse to prepare for delivery and storage
  • Pack and cut floral materials carefully to meet quality standards for orders
  • Move heavy goods within the warehouse safely to maintain workflow and organization

postedCompany.description:
XPRESSFLOWER.COM PTE. LTD.

Xpressflower.com is one of Singapore's leading flowers & gifts service provider that has been delivering gorgeous flowers for more than 15 years! Being a major player in Singapore's floral industry, we are committed to offering only the freshest flowers and gifts, backed by service that is reliable and prompt. We source and import the freshest and most beautiful blooms from countries all over the world to provide you with the best choices when it matters.

Xpressflower.com is anything but an ordinary florist. Apart from our 18 strategically located outlets and 24-hour delivery services nationwide, we take it up a notch by providing international delivery services so as to provide a one-stop solution to all your floral needs across the globe.

 

Harnessed with the latest technology and a comprehensive logistical network, Xpressflower.com provides an extensive range of products and services. We take pride in fostering successful, long-running partnerships by collaborating with some of the biggest brands including Disney, Osim, Bakerzin, Udders, Cakes Inspiration, Island Creamery, and Famous Amos.

 

We deliver round the clock, 7 days a week, throughout the year!

Make Xpressflower.com your 24hr personal concierge now! Sign up as a corporate customer and get exclusive benefits from us! For more information call us at 6280 1007 (6am-12mn) or log on to www.xpressflower.com.
